task: Compare the first and second most popular smartphones manufactured by Xiaomi and show the comparison chart.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task on Versus. It navigated to the smartphone category, set sorting to Popularity, filtered the brand to Xiaomi, and the resulting list showed the first two Xiaomi phones as Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro and Xiaomi 15T Pro. It then added those two phones to the comparison list and opened the comparison page. The final page title and URL confirm the comparison chart is displayed: 'Xiaomi 15T Pro vs Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro: What is the difference?' on versus.com, with the comparison sections and specs visible on screen.
final_result_response:
Done. I filtered Versus smartphones by Xiaomi and sorted by Popularity, then opened the comparison chart for:

1. Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro
2. Xiaomi 15T Pro

The comparison page is showing now.
action_history: Opening Versus: const p1 = await openTab('https://versus.com/');
Adding top two Xiaomi phones to compare: await page.locator('e632').click();

screenshots.title: Adding top two Xiaomi phones to compare
